_comment: CI regression thresholds for the eval harness. Routing thresholds apply in both dry and live runs; cost thresholds (max_native_total_usd, min_drift_pct), classifier accuracy, and quality thresholds (min_avg_quality_score, max_quality_drift_pct) are evaluated only when --live is set (quality also needs --quality). See eval/run_eval.py::gate.
